description: Update the public documentation site to cover the new SDK utilities from round 2: stripUndefined, widened buildQueryString type, and parseRateLimitHeader.
qualityChecks: cd docs && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run knip && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Add round 2 SDK utilities to documentation
userStories.description: Add documentation for stripUndefined, updated buildQueryString type, and parseRateLimitHeader to the SDK utilities reference page and plugin development guide.
acceptanceCriteria: Fetch section of utilities.mdx includes stripUndefined with signature, description, and example
Fetch section of utilities.mdx buildQueryString description updated to mention mixed array support
Fetch section of utilities.mdx includes parseRateLimitHeader with signature, description, and example
Plugin development guide mentions stripUndefined for request body construction
userStories.notes:
Files:
- docs/content/docs/sdk/utilities.mdx
- docs/content/docs/guides/plugin-development.mdx

Add to utilities.mdx Fetch section:

1. `stripUndefined<T>(obj)` — Filters out keys with undefined values from an object. Keeps null, 0, false, empty string. Usage:
```typescript
const { task_id, ...updates } = params;
await api(`/tasks/${task_id}`, { method: 'POST', body: stripUndefined(updates) });
```

2. Update `buildQueryString` to mention: 'Array values can be string[], number[], or boolean[] — all items are converted to strings.'

3. `parseRateLimitHeader(headers)` — Checks multiple rate limit headers (Retry-After, x-rate-limit-reset, x-ratelimit-reset, RateLimit-Reset) and normalizes to milliseconds. Usage:
```typescript
const retryMs = parseRateLimitHeader(response.headers);
if (retryMs) throw ToolError.rateLimited('Rate limited', retryMs);
```

Add to plugin-development.mdx in the SDK utilities section: mention stripUndefined as the recommended way to build request bodies with optional fields, replacing manual if-undefined checks.

Constraints:
- Follow the existing documentation style
- Do NOT change existing utility docs
